title: Define/Edit Print Job Model
text: Define/Edit Print Job Model Define a new print job model, or edit an existing model. Fields Name Device Type Print Queue Print Options Device Mode Margins Print using colors —prints the Background Color (BackColor) and Foreground Color (ForeColor) of a widget, if they are defined. Otherwise, the Print black on white option is used. How to Define a Print Job Model Related Links Print Job Models A print job model is a named collection of printer attributes that determine how and where Uniface forms or reports are printed, including details of the device type, margins, and so on. A print job model must be available before you can print. Printing Character Sets To print, choose the device translation table that is specific for the character set. Was this topic helpful?
